/usr/bin/ar qc libhunspell.a CMakeFiles/hunspell.dir/hunspell_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hunspell.dir/affentry.cxx.o CMakeFiles/hunspell.dir/affixmgr.cxx.o CMakeFiles/hunspell.dir/csutil.cxx.o CMakeFiles/hunspell.dir/filemgr.cxx.o CMakeFiles/hunspell.dir/hashmgr.cxx.o CMakeFiles/hunspell.dir/hunspell.cxx.o CMakeFiles/hunspell.dir/hunzip.cxx.o CMakeFiles/hunspell.dir/phonet.cxx.o CMakeFiles/hunspell.dir/replist.cxx.o CMakeFiles/hunspell.dir/suggestmgr.cxx.o CMakeFiles/hunspell.dir/utf_info.cxx.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libhunspell.a
